MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Attorney John Murphy has had some medical issues. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to June 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will ask the Probate Examiner to contact Mr. Murphy.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
